query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_partner_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedPartnerId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedPartnerId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unassigned_count
FROM leads 
WHERE customFields LIKE '%company_name%'
